name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Multiple File Deletions on Endpoint System
notes: This Building Block triggers when multiple non-temporary files are deleted on endpoint systems.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Multiple File Deletions on Endpoint System on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches NOT ("File Extension" IN ('swp', 'swpx') OR "Filename" MATCHES '~\$.*') AQL filter query
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Multiple File Deletions on Endpoint System on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches NOT ("File Extension" IN ('swp', 'swpx') OR "Filename" MATCHES '~\$.*') AQL filter query
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 10 minutes
